channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Hurricane debate at state capitol heats up as temperatures cool down
item.description: Cooler temperatures mean hurricane season is almost behind us, but the debate in the state capital over storm recovery is just heating up.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Defense pick Peter Hegseth paid accuser to protect his career, his lawyer confirms
item.description: The Fox News host reached a settlement to resolve an accusation against him, but a recently released memo brought the issue back into the public eye.
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell, MPR News

item.title: Trump taps Sean Duffy, Fox host and former congressman, for transportation secretary
item.description: President-elect Trump has picked Sean Duffy, a Fox Business host and former Republican congressman from Wisconsin, to head the Department of Transportation.
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose, MPR News

item.title: Trump picks Sean Duffy to be transportation secretary
item.description: Wisconsin Rep. Sean Duffy is a former reality TV star who was one of Trump’s most visible defenders on cable news.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, MICHELLE L. PRICE and DARLENE SUPERVILLE Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump nominates former Wisconsin Rep. Sean Duffy for Secretary of Transportation
item.description: President-elect Trump nominated former U.S. Rep. Sean Duffy to serve as the U.S. Secretary of Transportation on Monday, adding to his growing list of administration members.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he is naming former Wisconsin Rep. Sean Duffy to be transportation secretary
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump says former Wisconsin Rep. Sean Duffy is his choice to be transportation secretary as he continues to roll out picks for his Cabinet.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fox News Politics: Trump border czar pick fires back at House Dem critic
item.description: Get the latest updates on the Trump transition, the incoming Congress, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon and Elon Musk's SpaceX challenge labor agency's constitutionality in federal court
item.description: Attorneys for Amazon and Elon Musk’s SpaceX argued in a federal appeals court Monday that the National Labor Relations Board’s structure is unconstitutional, advancing a legal fight that may last into the Trump administration where Musk is expected to oversee bureaucratic cost-cutting.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former governor and presidential candidate becomes first to launch bid to chair Democratic Party
item.description: Former Maryland Gov. Martin O'Malley on Monday became the first person to announce a bid for chair of the Democratic National Committee, in the wake of the party's disastrous election results.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Advocates urge Biden to dismantle migrant detention before Trump takes office
item.description: Nearly 200 migrant advocacy groups have asked President Joe Biden to dismantle U.S. immigration detention facilities before President-Elect Donald Trump takes office, and to give humanitarian parole to some migrants currently detained.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, Fox 5

item.title: Court-martialed military veteran sentenced to over 4 years in prison for Capitol riot attack
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A former U.S. Army soldier who was court-martialed for fatally shooting a handcuffed civilian in Iraq two decades ago was sentenced on Monday to more than four years in prison for his role in the attack on the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021. Edward Richmond Jr.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Some Arab Americans who voted for Trump are concerned about his picks for key positions
item.description: LANSING, Mich. (AP) — Just a week after winning several of the nation’s largest Arab-majority cities, President-elect Donald Trump has filled top administration posts with staunch Israel supporters, including an ambassador to Israel who has claimed “there is no such thing as Palestinians.
item.dc:creator: JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Should women be allowed to fight on the front lines? Trump's defense pick reignites debate
item.description: President Donald Trump’s nominee for defense secretary, Pete Hegseth, has reignited a debate that many thought had been long settled.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: As China cracks down on bookstores at home, Chinese-language booksellers are flourishing overseas
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Yu Miao smiles as he stands among the 10,000 books crowded on rows of bamboo shelves in his newly reopened bookstore.
item.dc:creator: FU TING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pollster Ann Selzer steps aside in wake of huge Iowa poll miss
item.description: Top pollster Ann Selzer is set to retire from the Des Moines Register’s Iowa Poll after a shocking presidential survey was so wrong.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: From the Amazon rainforest, Biden declares nobody can reverse US progress on clean energy
item.description: MANAUS, Brazil (AP) — Speaking from the Amazon rainforest, President Joe Biden declared Sunday that there’s no going back in America’s “clean energy revolution” even as the incoming Trump administration vows to spur fossil fuel production and scale back efforts against climate change.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, GABRIELA SÁ PESSOA and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking a break from Cabinet picks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump-DeSantis complicated relationship could impact Senate pick: political expert
item.description: Gov. Ron DeSantis has a big decision to make if Sen. Marco Rubio is confirmed as the next Secretary of State.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The last actions the Biden administration will take before Trump takes over the White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Biden administration officials are working against the clock doling out billions in grants and taking other steps to try to preserve at least some of the outgoing president’s legacy before President-elect Donald Trump takes office in January.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, MATTHEW DALY and COLLIN BINKLEY Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump chooses anti-vaccine activist Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as health secretary
item.description: A longtime vaccine skeptic, Kennedy is an attorney who has built a loyal following over several decades of people who admire his lawsuits against major pesticide and pharmaceutical companies. He has pushed for tighter regulations around the ingredients in foods.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Matt Gaetz is Trump's pick for attorney general
item.description: President-elect Trump announced Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) will serve as his attorney general, tapping a loyal congressional ally who himself was the subject of a Justice Department investigation.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: Trump picks Marco Rubio as his Secretary of State
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump named Sen. Marco Rubio of Florida as his nominee for secretary of state on Wednesday, setting up a onetime critic who evolved into one of the president-elect’s fiercest defenders to become the nation’s top diplomat.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and JILL COLVIN Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump faces backlash to Hegseth pick for Pentagon chief
item.description: President-elect Trump’s surprise choice of Pete Hegseth, a conservative Fox News host, to serve as Defense secretary has enraged Democrats and left even some Republicans scratching their heads.
item.dc:creator: Colin Meyn, Fox 5

item.title: Trump draft executive order would set up board to oust generals en masse: Report
item.description: If signed by Trump once he takes office, it could allow the quick removal of generals and admirals and purge the ranks of those the future commander-in-chief takes issue with for whatever reason.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, WGN 9
